tasks.check: deno task check:js && deno task check:rs
tasks.check:rs: cargo check --manifest-path packages/tomat-client/src/tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets && cargo check --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-keychain/Cargo.toml --all-targets && cargo check --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-updater/Cargo.toml --all-targets
tasks.fmt: deno task fmt:js && deno task fmt:rs
tasks.fmt:js: deno fmt && deno run -A npm:oxfmt@0.51.0 packages/tomat-client/src/ui packages/tomat-client/vite.config.ts packages/tomat-client/svelte.config.js packages/tomat-client/uno.config.ts packages/tomat-website/src packages/tomat-website/astro.config.mjs
tasks.fmt:rs: cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-client/src/tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-keychain/Cargo.toml && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-updater/Cargo.toml
tasks.fmt:check: deno task fmt:check:js && deno task fmt:check:rs
tasks.fmt:check:js: deno fmt --check && deno run -A npm:oxfmt@0.51.0 --check packages/tomat-client/src/ui packages/tomat-client/vite.config.ts packages/tomat-client/svelte.config.js packages/tomat-client/uno.config.ts packages/tomat-website/src packages/tomat-website/astro.config.mjs
tasks.fmt:check:rs: cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-client/src/tauri/Cargo.toml --check && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-keychain/Cargo.toml --check && cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-updater/Cargo.toml --check
tasks.lint: deno task lint:js && deno task lint:rs
tasks.lint:js: deno lint && deno lint --config scripts/lint-plugins/client-deno.json packages/tomat-client/src/ui && deno run -A --quiet scripts/lint-plugins/check-tauri-imports-svelte.ts && deno run -A npm:oxlint@1.66.0 -c .oxlintrc.json packages/tomat-client/src/ui packages/tomat-client/vite.config.ts packages/tomat-client/svelte.config.js packages/tomat-client/uno.config.ts packages/tomat-website/src packages/tomat-website/astro.config.mjs
tasks.lint:rs: cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/tomat-client/src/tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-keychain/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-updater/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
tasks.test: deno task test:js && deno task test:rs
tasks.test:js: deno task test:deno && deno task test:ui
tasks.test:rs: cargo test --manifest-path packages/tomat-client/src/tauri/Cargo.toml --lib && cargo test --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-keychain/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path packages/tomat-core-updater/Cargo.toml
